CVE-2020-13756.title: Sabberworm PHP CSS Parser before 8.3.1 calls eval on uncontrolled ...
CVE-2020-13756.description: Sabberworm PHP CSS Parser before 8.3.1 calls eval on uncontrolled data, possibly leading to remote code execution if the function allSelectors() or getSelectorsBySpecificity() is called with input from an attacker.
